name: azure-rbac-azure-skills
description: Helps users find the right Azure RBAC role for an identity with least privilege access, then generate CLI commands and Bicep code to assign it.
intent_triggers: use the azure rbac agent skill
run a workflow for azure rbac
我需要處理 azure rbac 相關工作
幫我啟用 azure rbac 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 azure rbac

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the azure rbac skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
